title: ToolTip Pro
description: look at villager trades fast for easy villager trading hall setups don't waste time clicking the villager to see if he has Mending and don't waste time clicking every villager to find the one you wanted to trade make it easy and fast with TTP!
body:
# **TooltipPro**

See villager trades instantly — no GUI required.

TooltipPro enhances the Jade / WAILA tooltip by displaying a villager’s trades directly in the HUD when you look at them. This removes the need to constantly open the trading interface just to check what a villager sells.

The trades are displayed in a clean, compact layout using item icons so you can instantly understand the exchange at a glance.

### Features

• Instant trade preview
View a villager's trades simply by looking at them.

• Dynamic prices
Prices reflect real villager demand, discounts, and penalties — exactly as they appear in the trading GUI.

• Icon-based layout
Trades are shown using item icons instead of text for faster readability.

• Sorted trades
Trades are automatically sorted alphabetically by result item.

• Out-of-stock filtering
Trades that are currently locked will not appear.

• Enchanted book support
Displays enchantment names and levels (for example: Mending I, Protection IV).

• Optimized server sync
Trade data is transferred efficiently through Jade's server data system.

• Client-side usage
Works on vanilla servers as long as you have Jade installed.

### Requirements

Minecraft 1.21+

Fabric Loader

Jade (WAILA)

**Example**

When looking at a villager:

Emerald → Iron Pickaxe
15 Coal → Emerald
Emerald + Book → Mending I

All trades appear directly in the tooltip without opening the villager GUI.

### Planned Features

Hide specific trades from the HUD

Toggle display modes

Configurable trade sorting

Improved tooltip layout options

Better performance optimization

## Credits
